description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and an open floor plan. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and double doors at the front, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. Inside, the house features a spacious living room, dining area, kitchen, and several smaller rooms, likely bedrooms and bathrooms, all arranged around a central open space. The furnishings are minimalistic, with light-colored tables, chairs, and sofas, and the flooring appears to be a light wood or tile. The house sits on a green base, suggesting a small yard or garden area around the perimeter. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a clean, uncluttered aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior walls, large windows, and an open, minimalistic interior layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing double entry doors, large windows, and a clear view into the open living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the kitchen, dining tables, and a more enclosed section with interior doors.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the office area, multiple tables, and the back wall with windows and curtains.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing interior partitions, a visible bathroom or utility area, and a large wall-mounted screen.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double doors with glass panels, no steps, minimal overhang, and a clean, modern appearance
